programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby: S4
programme.desc: Presenters Giles Coren and Monica Galetti visit locations that represent the ultimate in luxury. In this series, they stay at a design hotel tucked away in a remote part of Iceland, experience the magic of the desert at a secluded Abu Dhabi resort, and venture beyond the lobby at London's most expensive - and exclusive - hotel, and more.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: The Triangle Man wants to win a prize at the sports carnival so badly that he cheats, not knowing that it is a trap set by the Imp. The gang bail him out. The Imp sells extra hot chili which sets everybody's mouth on fire. Coincidentally, there is no milk in the store to help put the fires out. What will they do?

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Pocoyo S1
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Chinese) Pocoyo is a curious, fun-loving, friendly toddler who's always into something new whether he's on a quest with his friends in outer space or just cleaning up his blocks, every day is an adventure.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Super Rover & Friends
programme.desc: Someone has been leaving tiny bite marks on Vicky's vegetables. Who could the tiny culprit be?

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Films & Stars

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Razali is trying hard to become a better man for Zara, but is it too late? Ananya and Kenneth try to find out who did Nikky's homework for him. Debbie's plan to help Handsome boost his confidence backfires.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is back with an uplifting series that takes us through the whole year – from spring to winter – celebrating gorgeous ingredients and the delicious dishes we can make with them.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club S2
programme.desc: While life in the idyllic town of Marlow has just about returned to normal after a chain of murders rattled the tightly knit community, it's not long before retired archaeologist Judith Potts, dog-walker Suzie Harris, and Vicar's wife Becks Starling are called back into action to solve a series of new crimes that befall the local residents.

programme.title: Watson S1
programme.desc: Stephens musters the courage to ask Watson to help him when his camgirl suddenly collapses during a video call. programme.title: 锦月如歌

programme.title: 出走澳洲
programme.desc: 走过浮华大地足球圣地后黄翠如洪永城相隔五年再次合作主持旅游节目他们以自驾形式游历澳洲从阿德莱德出发穿越大洋路到墨尔本塔斯曼尼亚是二人初次拍摄旅游节目的地方十多年后重临旧地感受如何 有一种关系叫洪永城和黄翠如二人由青葱岁月相识至今同步经历人生不同阶段结成真挚感情不逊情侣的好朋友这一次出走他们除了畅谈关系上的种种变化还会公开绝密照片跟观众分享二人的共同回忆.

programme.title: 饭罪现场
programme.desc: 当新人侦探谢俊峰遇上资深前辈郭亮和权怡凤他们能否擦出火花成功破案探长田铭耀带领味觉侦探们试图侦破一起谜题重重的疑案四人仿佛置身密室必须破解煮谋留下的疑团才能查出真相锅里的可疑污渍是什么镜像中的符号到底藏了什么玄机来到四人讨论会俊峰为什么犹豫不决不肯说出真相.

programme.title: 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: 年过半百的乐龄人士在为家庭和事业奉献多年后终于迎来了人生的新篇章那些藏在心底的梦想如今将再次点亮舞台 新系列的节目将延续团战的形式为乐龄朋友们提供一个更多元更有趣的荣誉舞台让大家拥有同样的机会携手走到最后参赛者也可以一起展现真我切磋技艺以歌会友让生活更喜乐安康.

programme.title: 与天地对话
programme.desc: 四名不同背景的艺人包括姜皓文蔡思贝余文乐林盛斌在近乎没有别人帮助的情况下独自走访南也门索科特拉岛澳洲昆士兰大堡礁及北领地红土地区分别探讨人生四个重大思考课题身在逆境应如何自处人生最可怕是什么人生为谁而活性格是否决定命运在渺无人烟的天地之间每位艺人都于最真诚无任何骚扰之下抚心自问来一场真正的与天地对话对自己敞开真正的心扉.

programme.title: 他乡的煮人
programme.desc: 他乡的煮人将通过发掘各人的奋斗经历美食背后的故事以及烹调上精益求精的匠人精神加深观众对香港美食的认知不同年代皆有香港厨师凭借自身实力于世界各地一展所长落地生根节目将展现他们如何坚持香港饮食文化的传承创新融合三大原则将独一无二的香港美食立足他乡成就一个个动人的香港煮人故事.

programme.title: 敦煌千年不散的宴席
programme.desc: 中华民族之所以五千年生生不息绵延不绝就是因为我们的语言文字风俗饮食都是千年传承从来没有中断观众发现以往秦川安秋导演创作的敦煌纪录片都承载了非常厚重的历史文化信息这次的美食片却大不一样从主题定位人物故事叙事方式等都有了非常大的改变叙述风格也生动活泼了很多让观众看到了更多的人间烟火一种田园诗般的美该片通过将敦煌壁画饮食文化呈现出来并将当下敦煌百姓的生活状态一日三餐加工食物的过程忠实记录下来以展现敦煌饮食文化的传承与发展.

programme.title: 上山下海过一夜
programme.desc: 第三集我们终于要见识到白色嘉明湖的壮阔奇景了攀登嘉明湖一直是台湾山岳人必做的事却也往往被视为新手入门版本的百岳行程没想到这次在这样的路线中我们遇到了仅次于能高纵走行程的危机也看见了往常不曾见过的美丽以往风光明媚璀璨如珍珠的高山蓝宝居然瞬间翻脸连走过八千米高峰的三条鱼都急忙喊着要下撤山上的冰风雪实在太折磨人了这一集我们将呈现出月地攀登时的紧急危难以及如何自救自保.

programme.title: 我们的国家公园 III
